prerequisites: A Northpass LMS account with administrator access to the Admin panel.
Access to the Apps section of the Admin panel (Apps -> Api Access) to generate or retrieve an API key.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Northpass authenticates every request with a single API key. Generate or retrieve it from the Admin panel under Apps -> Api Access, then provide it as the connector's api_key. Northpass accepts the key either as the X-Api-Key request header or as an api_key query parameter, and all requests must be made over HTTPS. A missing or invalid key returns a 401 response.

setupSteps.title: Generate your Northpass API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Northpass as an administrator and open the Admin panel. Go to Apps -> Api Access and obtain your API key.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the API key into the connector's required api_key field. Northpass sends this value as the X-Api-Key header on each request over HTTPS to authenticate the source.
